issues.description: Some vocabulary terms like 'implicit information' and 'analysis' may be challenging for beginning 6th graders, but appropriate for standard mastery
Quiz only covers 6 of 10 vocabulary terms, missing questions for textual evidence, implicit information, citation, and reasoning
Answer format inconsistency - some answers include word definitions while others don't

strengths: Excellent alignment with RI.6.1 standard for citing textual evidence and supporting inferences
Vocabulary terms are precisely selected and directly support the learning objective
Clear, grade-appropriate definitions with strong contextual examples
Quiz questions test comprehension effectively with appropriate multiple choice format
Professional structure follows template requirements completely
Vocabulary progression builds from basic concepts to more complex analysis skills
overall_assessment: Strong vocabulary pack that effectively supports RI.6.1 mastery with minor structural improvements needed for quiz coverage and answer formatting consistency.
